title: 假日旅途中的意外帮助
sentences: Tom is a young writer, and Anna is an adult.
Before a holiday trip, Anna gives Tom some advice about the weather.
Tom says that his bag is ready, but his warm coat is still at home.
When they arrive at the station, the sky is dark and the rain begins.
Anna sits on a chair while Tom wants to find a place to buy a coat.
A second adult is waiting near the door with a large bag.
The adult sees Tom and puts a coat on the chair.
You may use it during the trip.
Tom remembers the advice from Anna and feels sorry because he did not listen.
On the train, the adult tells them that he is also a writer.
They talk about the village, the river, and a story with a strange end.
When the train is at the village, the rain is over and their holiday can begin.
That night, Tom writes about the trip, the chair, and the advice that can help him.
Anna reads the story and says that the new writer can use better advice next time.
translations: 汤姆是一名年轻作家，安娜是一位成年人。
假日旅行前，安娜给了汤姆一些关于天气的建议。
汤姆说他的包已经准备好了，但保暖外套还在家里。
他们到达车站时，天空变暗，雨也开始下了。
安娜坐在椅子上，汤姆则想找个地方买外套。
另一位成年人提着一个大包，在门边等候。
那位成年人看见汤姆，把一件外套放在椅子上。
旅行期间你可以穿它。
汤姆想起安娜的建议，因为自己没有听从而感到后悔。
在火车上，那位成年人告诉他们，他也是一名作家。
他们谈到村庄、河流，以及一个结局奇怪的故事。
火车到达村庄时，雨已经停了，他们的假期可以开始了。
那天晚上，汤姆写下了这次旅行、那把椅子和能够帮助他的建议。
安娜读完故事后说，这位新作家下次可以更好地听取建议。

title: 表格上的小蚂蚁
sentences: Tom and Anna are in a room.
They have a form on the table.
Tom and Anna are able, and they can make the form red and white.
The form has no colour now.
An ant is on Tom's head.
Tom is not able; he can not see the ant.
Anna looks at Tom's head and sees the ant.
Anna has humour about the small thing.
Tom has no humour about the ant.
Anna can make the ant go on the table.
The ant is on the form, and the form now has a black colour.
Tom can see the colour and has humour now.
They are able, and they make the form good.
translations: 汤姆和安娜在一个房间里。
他们把一张表格放在桌上。
汤姆和安娜有能力把表格做成红白两色。
这张表格现在还没有颜色。
一只蚂蚁爬到了汤姆的头上。
汤姆做不到，他看不见那只蚂蚁。
安娜看着汤姆的头，发现了那只蚂蚁。
安娜觉得这件小事很有趣。
汤姆却觉得那只蚂蚁一点也不好笑。
安娜让蚂蚁爬到桌上。
蚂蚁停在表格上，表格现在有了黑色。
汤姆看见这个颜色后，也觉得有趣了。
他们有能力把表格做好。

title: 拱门下的一顿饭
sentences: Tom and Anna are near an arch.
A meal is in a box under the arch.
The meal is for a man.
One of the boxes is closed.
Tom and Anna can go to the meal.
The door to the room is closed.
Tom can be near the door.
Anna can be under the arch.
Tom looks at one of the boxes.
Anna can go to Tom.
The man can come to the arch.
The box is for the man, and the meal is for Tom and Anna.
Tom, Anna, and the man can be near the arch for the meal.
translations: 汤姆和安娜在一座拱门附近。
一顿饭装在拱门下面的盒子里。
这顿饭是给一名男子的。
其中一个盒子关着。
汤姆和安娜可以走到那顿饭旁边。
通往房间的门关着。
汤姆可以站在门边。
安娜可以站在拱门下面。
汤姆查看其中一个盒子。
安娜可以走到汤姆身边。
那名男子可以来到拱门旁。
盒子给那名男子，而这顿饭给汤姆和安娜。
汤姆、安娜和那名男子都可以在拱门旁一起吃这顿饭。

title: 门边的表格
sentences: Tom is with Anna in the room.
That room has a red book.
Anna can say that the book is for Tom.
Tom has the book, but the form is not with him.
The form is by the door.
Tom can say the form is not there.
Anna looks from the table to the door.
She sees a black box by the door.
The form is in that box, but the box is closed.
Tom can open the box.
Anna has the form from the box.
Tom is with Anna, and they say that the form is good.
The red book is by Tom, but the form is for Anna.
translations: 汤姆和安娜一起待在房间里。
那个房间里有一本红色的书。
安娜可以说那本书是给汤姆的。
汤姆拿着书，但表格不在他身边。
表格在门边。
汤姆说表格不在那里。
安娜从桌子看向门口。
她看见门边有一个黑色盒子。
表格就在那个盒子里，但盒子是关着的。
汤姆可以打开盒子。
安娜从盒子里拿到了表格。
汤姆和安娜在一起，他们都说表格已经填好了。
红色的书在汤姆身边，而表格是给安娜的。

title: 谁来拿红色的书
sentences: Tom and Anna are with all the people in a room.
Who will get the red book?
Tom or Anna will get it.
All the people look at Tom and Anna.
Anna can not get the book, as the box is closed.
Tom can not get it, but he looks at the box as Anna does.
Who can open the box?
Tom or Anna can use the table.
Anna will open the box on the table.
Tom will get the book.
All the people can see the red book.
Tom and Anna get food for all the people.
Who will get the food, Tom or Anna?
They all get food.
translations: 汤姆和安娜与所有人一起待在一个房间里。
谁会拿到那本红色的书？
汤姆或安娜会拿到它。
所有人都看着汤姆和安娜。
安娜拿不到那本书，因为盒子关着。
汤姆也拿不到，但他像安娜一样查看盒子。
谁能打开盒子？
汤姆或安娜可以借助桌子。
安娜会在桌上打开盒子。
汤姆会拿到那本书。
所有人都能看到那本红色的书。
汤姆和安娜为所有人拿来食物。
谁会拿到食物，是汤姆还是安娜？
他们所有人都得到了食物。

title: 今年送上楼的食物
sentences: Tom and Anna have some food in a box.
This year, they will take the food up to a room.
If Tom can go up, Anna will take the box.
The box is so big, but Tom is able.
Tom can go up, but the box can not.
If Anna has some food, the box is not so big.
Anna can take some food from the box.
Tom can take the box up to the room.
The door is closed, so they can not go in.
If Tom opens the door, Anna can go in.
The room has a form for this year.
Anna has some colour on the form.
Tom and Anna can take the form and food.
This year, they have a good meal in the room.
translations: 汤姆和安娜有一些装在盒子里的食物。
今年，他们要把食物拿到楼上的一个房间。
如果汤姆能上楼，安娜就拿着盒子。
盒子非常大，但汤姆有能力搬动它。
汤姆能上楼，但盒子却上不去。
如果安娜先拿走一些食物，盒子就没有那么大了。
安娜从盒子里拿出一些食物。
汤姆把盒子拿到楼上的房间。
门关着，所以他们进不去。
如果汤姆打开门，安娜就能进去。
房间里有一张今年使用的表格。
安娜在表格上涂了一些颜色。
汤姆和安娜把表格和食物拿进去。
今年，他们在房间里吃了一顿不错的饭。
